name: RIN Beta — Dev feedback and approach
description: Coding patterns, gotchas, and confirmed approaches for RIN beta development
type: feedback
---

Always use `supabaseExternal` from `@/lib/supabaseExternal` — never `supabase` from `@/integrations/supabase/client`.
**Why:** There is no `.env` file in the project so VITE_SUPABASE_URL / VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY are undefined. The internal client silently fails. `supabaseExternal` has hardcoded URL + anon key and works correctly.
**How to

name: RIN Beta — Project Overview
description: RIN roadside dispatch platform — architecture, workflow, and key decisions
type: project
---

Project is at `/Users/b.lamoutlook.com/Downloads/rin-beta` (Vite + React + TypeScript + Supabase).
Dev server runs on `http://localhost:8080` (not 5173).
Supabase project ID: `zyoszbmahxnfcokuzkuv`
GitHub Repo: `https://github.com/barneslam/rin-beta`
Audit log: `CLAUDE_AUDIT_LOG.md` in project root

**Why:** Building a dispatcher-facing roadside incident ma

1. `/intake` — Dispatcher creates job → customer SMS with vehicle, location, issue, can_vehicle_roll, and `/confirm/:jobId` link
2. Customer confirms via SMS (YES) or web link → `pending_pricing`
3. `/validation` → `/pricing` — Dispatcher sets price → SMS to customer "reply APPROVE"
4. Customer replies APPROVE → Stripe auth → `payment_authorization_required` → `ready_for_dispatch`
5. `/matching` — Driver Matching (open for `ready_for_dispatch` OR `payment_authorized`)
6. `/offer` — Driver offer

- Dispatcher clicks "Amend Job" in Step 7 → sets revised price + reason → `customer_reapproval_pending`
- `send-amendment-sms` fires automatically → customer receives YES/NO SMS for revised charge
- Dispatcher simulates response via "Customer Approved / Declined" buttons

- Dispatcher clicks "Driver Unable to Complete" OR driver texts CANCEL
- → `driver_cancelled_at_scene`, driver unassigned, no compensation, customer notified

- `job_status` enum includes: `pending_completion_approval`, `driver_cancelled_at_scene`
- `completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ` column exists on jobs table (added 2026-03-29)
- Payment bypass: sets `stripe_payment_intent_id = bypass_test_{timestamp}` — `complete-job` detects prefix and skips Stripe

- Customer: Peter, user_id=a5f0d336-8575-4117-b223-ebf5110b15ed, phone=+16472847417
- Driver: Test Tow Driver (Mike Chen / FastTow Toronto), driver_id=0ecf6a1e-6109-494c-aff8-66451ea63f41, phone=+16474731338
- Truck: Standard Flatbed (truck_type_id: 65e4cdc1-0b83-41ec-aa99-a28ae990eaa3), status available
- Incident types Tow/Accident/Winch/Stuck Vehicle require Standard Flatbed; Battery/Flat Tire/Fuel/Lockout accept all trucks

name: Security Audit — XSS, Auth, Input Validation
description: Critical vulnerabilities found: DOM-based XSS in Galoras, unauthenticated RIN dispatch API, no input validation
type: project
---

### 1. DOM-based XSS in Galoras MVP App
**File:** `Downloads/Galoras_MVP_Netlify_Demo_v3_Admin/assets/js/app.js:35`
**Risk:** HIGH — localStorage data (name, photo, id) flows directly to innerHTML without HTML escaping
**Fix:** Replace innerHTML with textContent, or sanitize with DOMPurify before DOM insertion
**Why:** Malicious data in localStorage (via compromised source or MITM) executes arbitrary JavaScript

### 2. Missing Authentication on RIN Dispatch Bridge
**File:** `Downloads/bridge.js:

1. ✅ Run comprehensive security audit (completed 2026-03-30)
2. ⏳ Implement input validation on dispatch endpoints (priority: immediate)
3. ⏳ Add authentication to dispatch API (priority: immediate)
4. ⏳ Refactor DOM rendering to use safe methods (priority: high)
5. ⏳ Replace execSync patterns with execFile or remove (priority: medium)

name: Work Style

Likes to work with the Coaching Exchange app (galoras-dev) open alongside other browser tabs. The memory directory path (`~/.claude/projects/-Users-b-lamoutlook-com-galoras-dev/memory/`) is a useful reference point he keeps in view.
